prohibitions.summary: US-E USES PERMITTED No development permit shall be issued in any US-E Zone except for the following: Utilities Conservation uses Public parks and playgrounds Dartmouth Land Use By-law Page 114 SECTION 4: SCHEDULING Dartmouth Land Use By-law Page 115 SCHEDULE A-1: Wind Energy Zoning (RC-Jun 25/14;E-Oct 18/14) (RC-Sep 18/19;E-Nov 30/19) (RC-Oct 26/21;E-Nov 27/21) (RC-Feb 15/22;E-Apr 9/22) (Special Area Task Force-Jan 26/23;E-Feb 3/23) (RC-Mar 18/25; EFF Apr 23/25) Dartmouth Land Use By-law Page 116 Dartmouth Land Use By-law Page 117 SCHEDULE H: Repealed (RC-Sep 30/20;E-Dec 5/20) SCHEDULE J: WATER RESERVOIR
